lastTopKey: INFO|docs/plan.md|Plan/contract mismatch: `docs/plan.md` doesn’t mention `/api/parse-file`, the `fileId` temp-store flow, or OCR system dependencies, but they are implemented in `src/server.js` and `src/lib/temp-store.js`.
